apps.title: Fault Level Calculator
apps.description: IEC 60909 short-circuit tool with transformer K-factor and optional inverter contribution.

apps.title: Grid Impedance Calculator
apps.description: Calculate Pos. and Zero-sequence source impedance from LLL and LG fault levels.

apps.title: Arc Flash Calculator
apps.description: IEEE 1584-2018 incident energy, arc-flash boundary and PPE category — VCB, VCBB, HCB, VOA, HOA · 208 V – 15 kV.

apps.title: Protection Coordination
apps.description: Interactive overcurrent TCC plotter — IEC / ANSI / IEEE curves, highset stages, transformer I²t, grading margin table.

apps.title: Transformer R & X Calculator
apps.description: Derive R, X values from FAT Z & loss data — per-unit, HV and LV ohmic values, X/R ratio, SC power factor, rated currents, and turns ratio.
